data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. TREANMOR shaped with plenty of promise when third over 1600m at Meydan in January. Previous debut success adds further appeal. Leading contender representing Godolphin at this meeting. 15. ALBAYDAA returns after five and a half months having ended the last campaign with a Wolverhampton victory tackling 1400m. Fresh record commands respect. 14. SOVEREIGN SPELL made a striking reappearance when prevailing by 5.5L contesting 1200m at Wolverhampton. Although this asks a sterner question he remains open to plenty of progress. 3. SILENT APPLAUSE was not disgraced among Listed company at York last summer and holds definite top three claims.","runners":[4,15,14,3],"exclusive":false}
